title: HeadGear – The Ultimate Custom Headgear Plugin! (1.8-26.1.2)
description: Unlock Your Imagination: Wear Any Item, Anywhere with HeadGear!
body:
# 🎩 HeadGear – The Ultimate Custom Headgear Plugin!

HeadGear is a lightweight yet powerful Minecraft **Spigot/Paper/Purpur** plugin that allows players to wear almost ANY item as headgear while gaining custom effects, bonus hearts, and unique gameplay mechanics.

Perfect for:
**RPG • Survival • SMP • Minigames • MMO • Custom Servers**

---

# ✨ Features

✔ Wear ANY Item on Your Head  
✔ Custom Potion Effects  
✔ Bonus Hearts System ❤️  
✔ Dual Cooldown System ⏳  
✔ Item Blacklist Support 🚫  
✔ Fully Configurable ⚙  
✔ Lightweight & Optimized 🪶  
✔ Supports 1.8 → 26.1.2 🔄  

---

# ⚡ Cooldown Systems

## 🔒 Prevention Cooldown
Prevents players from instantly re-equipping removed headgear.

## 🔄 Post-Effect Cooldown
Cooldown starts AFTER the effect duration ends.

Perfect for balancing RPG and survival gameplay.

---

# ❤️ Bonus Hearts

Give players additional hearts while wearing special items.

### Example:
- Diamond_Helmat → +4 Hearts

Fully configurable per item.

---

# 🖱 Important Usage Information

# ✅ Use RIGHT CLICK to equip HeadGear

# ❌ LEFT CLICK will NOT activate effects

Effects and bonus hearts only work when equipped correctly using RIGHT CLICK.

---

# ⚠ Version Notice

## ⚠ Minecraft 1.8.x (especially 1.8.9)
Older versions may contain:
- Minor effect bugs
- Small visual glitches
- Potion synchronization issues

These issues are caused by older Minecraft APIs and will be improved in future updates.

---

# ✅ Fully Stable Versions

Recommended & fully stable on:
  ## 🔄 1.12 to 26.1.2

---

# 📂 Configuration

### ⚙ Config.yml
Configure:
- Messages
- Cooldowns
- Blacklists
- Default settings

🔗 [Config.yml](https://github.com/XpiderMon/HeadGear/blob/b539e842b0dce20053cdb578e09ed85b1873ce4b/HeadGear/target/classes/config.yml)

---

### 🧩 Items.yml
Configure:
- Wearable items
- Effects
- Bonus hearts
- Item cooldowns

🔗 [Items.yml](https://github.com/XpiderMon/HeadGear/blob/b539e842b0dce20053cdb578e09ed85b1873ce4b/HeadGear/target/classes/items.yml)

---

# 🛡 Permission

| Permission | Description | Default |
|------------|-------------|---------|
| `headgear.use` | Allows usage of HeadGear | `true` |

---

# 💬 Support

## 🔗 Discord
https://discord.gg/czUy2sjNVV

---

# 🚀 Download HeadGear v5.0 Now!

Create unique wearable items and RPG-style gameplay mechanics for your server!
